modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty marking D2L dropbox assignments as read or unread.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing issues with marking assignments in the D2L dropbox as either read or unread. They are unsure of the process to complete this action. This situation may affect their ability to track assignment status effectively.
